goal: Agent conversationnel autonome 100% local avec interface Spotify-like et animations GIF fluides.

hardware_config.mcu: YD-ESP32-S3 N16R8 (VCC-GND Studio) — dual-core 240MHz, 512KB SRAM, 8MB PSRAM OPI, 16MB Flash

SPI_BUS.note: Shared bus for TFT, SD, and Touch

passive_components.filtering: 100µF + 100nF on MAX98357A VIN; 10µF + 100nF on INMP441 VCC
passive_components.audio_gain: 10kΩ resistor on MAX GAIN to GND (~3.6dB)
passive_components.amplifier_sd: 390kΩ pull-up on MAX SD to 5V (hardware limit)

firmware.audio_fix: I2S driver forced uninstall during mode switching (Spotify <-> AI)

backend_python.concurrency: RobotSession class for multi-client isolation, Lock() on LLM calls
